name: RPC INC
summary: RPC, Inc. is an oilfield services company providing a range of specialized services and equipment to the oil and gas industry. Its Technical Services segment includes pressure pumping, downhole tools, coiled tubing, nitrogen, and other completion and production services. Its Support Services segment provides equipment rental, pipe handling, and inspection services primarily to U.S. domestic markets.

products.name: Pressure Pumping
products.description: Hydraulic fracturing and cementing services for oil and gas well completions.

products.name: Downhole Tools
products.description: Differentiated downhole tool services with opportunities for technological innovation and new product development.

products.name: Coiled Tubing
products.description: Coiled tubing services for well intervention and completion operations.

products.name: Nitrogen Services
products.description: Nitrogen pumping services used in well completion and workover operations.

products.name: Equipment Rental
products.description: Rental of oilfield equipment to exploration and production customers.

products.name: Pipe Handling and Inspection
products.description: Pipe handling, inspection and related support services for oilfield operations.

products.name: Tier 4 DGB Pressure Pumping Fleets
products.description: Dual-fuel, lower emission pressure pumping equipment being phased in to replace older fleets.

products.name: Electric Pressure Pumping Fleets
products.description: Electric-powered pressure pumping equipment under evaluation for future investment.

partnerships.description: RPC expects to enter a new Transition Support Services agreement with MasterCraft following the proposed merger between Marine Products and MasterCraft.
